title: lappula simplex
intro: Lappula simplex, also known as the silky bugloss or silky lappula, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lappula simplex include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps. Lappula simplex can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
